description: User dwells on the search results for London to Ireland, likely reading the different travel options provided by Rome2Rio.

description: User clicks on the destination input field to enter a new location.
User types "scotland" into the destination search box.
User clicks the search button to update the travel route.
The page updates to show travel options from Ireland to Scotland.
